stub_provenance_note: Stub canned hit for KCNH2. Higher predicted pIC50; lower hERG_IC50_uM warrants hERG safety review at screening stage. ADMET from Chemprop v2 stub; pIC50 from Boltz-2 stub. Real values require Runpod GPU adapters.
